ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the model */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the model was updated */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the model */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "trained_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was trained */,
  "trained_by" TEXT /* User who trained the model */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the training process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model version */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Total time taken for training in seconds */,
  "training_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model was trained */,
  "hardware_used" TEXT /* Hardware used for training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of performance metrics */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version */,
  "training_loss" REAL /* Training loss of the model */,
  "validation_loss" REAL /* Validation loss of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Test accuracy of the model */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Total time taken for training in seconds */,
  "data_split" TEXT /* Description of how the data was split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of training parameters */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs the model was trained for */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during training */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used during training */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used during training */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Loss function used during training */,
  "data_normalization" TEXT /* Type of data normalization used */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate used during training */,
  "early_stopping" INTEGER /* Whether early stopping was used */,
  "regularization" TEXT /* Type of regularization used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_parameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was created */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the dataset was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions_datasets" (
  "version_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version and dataset relationship */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., training, validation, test) */,
  "data_split_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of data split for this specific dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_datasets_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, machine learning engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model version */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the model version was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)
